remarks: Modern elegance meets suburban convenience in the heart of Glenbrook. From the moment you step inside, the natural light and gorgeous hardwood floors set an airy, welcoming tone. The heart of the home is the stunningly renovated kitchen-sleek quartz countertops, on-trend gray cabinetry, stainless/integrated appliances, and a beautiful glass backsplash make it an absolute standout for the home chef. Flowing effortlessly from the kitchen, the open living and dining space radiates warmth, anchored by a cozy brick fireplace that's practically begging for crisp autumn nights or intimate dinner parties. A main-level powder room and seamless access to both the basement and backyard patio add to the smart, functional layout. Upstairs, the primary serves as a true retreat with a spacious walk-in closet, flanked by two additional bright bedrooms and a full bath beautifully illuminated by a skylight. Outside, your private oasis awaits: a fully fenced backyard and patio perfect for weekend BBQs, playtime, or letting pets run free. Complete with an attached 1-car garage and a 2-car driveway, you are minutes from the Glenbrook train station, I-95, and Stamford's vibrant dining and shopping scene. It's the perfect place to call home.
